name: White Chocolate Cheesecake- Walt
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the white chocolate in a double boiler over low heat until smooth and fully melted.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese and sugar with an electric mixer until creamy and well combined.
3. Add the eggs to the cream cheese mixture one at a time, ensuring each egg is fully incorporated before adding the next.
4. Stir in the melted white chocolate into the cream cheese mixture until thoroughly blended.
5. Pour the batter into a prepared chocolate cookie crust lined baking dish.
6. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F (175°C), or until set and slightly golden around the edges.
7. Allow the cheesecake to cool completely before cutting and serving.
